Localization.Description: An attempt to upload files is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to upload files to host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} with the command {object.process.cmdline} is detected
An attempt to upload files to host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} with the command {object.process.cmdline} is detected
